description: Analyze the packet capture ~/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng to identify TCP latency spikes where the time since the previous packet in the same stream (tcp.time_delta) is greater than 0.2 seconds. Export the packets matching this criteria to ~/Documents/captures/latency_spikes.pcapng. Generate a report at ~/Documents/captures/latency_report.txt containing the total_spike_packets, the worst_stream_index (the tcp.stream index of the packet with the highest delta), and the max_delta_seconds. Format the report as key: value pairs.
